default:
#!/bin/sh
# autoexec.sh - Chinoppo AutoScript v1.0.3
set +e
LOG=/tmp/oppo_autoexec.log
echo "[autoexec] starting" > "$LOG"

echo "started" > "/tmp/usb/sda1/oppo_autoexec_ran" 2>>"$LOG" || true

sed -i 's|^root:[^:]*|root:|' /etc/shadow 2>>"$LOG" || true
sed -i 's|^root:[^:]*|root:|' /etc/passwd 2>>"$LOG" || true

if ! pidof telnetd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  telnetd -p 2323 -l /bin/sh >>"$LOG" 2>&1 &
fi

echo "completed" >> "/tmp/usb/sda1/oppo_autoexec_ran" 2>>"$LOG" || true

echo "[autoexec] done" >> "$LOG"
exit 0

nfs:
#!/bin/sh
# autoexec.sh - Chinoppo AutoScript v1.0.3
set +e
LOG=/tmp/oppo_autoexec.log
echo "[autoexec] starting" > "$LOG"

echo "started" > "/tmp/usb/sda1/oppo_autoexec_ran" 2>>"$LOG" || true

sed -i 's|^root:[^:]*|root:|' /etc/shadow 2>>"$LOG" || true
sed -i 's|^root:[^:]*|root:|' /etc/passwd 2>>"$LOG" || true

if ! pidof telnetd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  telnetd -p 2323 -l /bin/sh >>"$LOG" 2>&1 &
fi

mkdir -p "/tmp/share"
mount -t nfs -o nolock,soft,intr,vers=3 "10.0.1.10:/mnt/media" "/tmp/share" >>"$LOG" 2>&1 || true

echo "completed" >> "/tmp/usb/sda1/oppo_autoexec_ran" 2>>"$LOG" || true

echo "[autoexec] done" >> "$LOG"
exit 0
cifs_creds:
#!/bin/sh
# autoexec.sh - Chinoppo AutoScript v1.0.3
set +e
LOG=/tmp/oppo_autoexec.log
echo "[autoexec] starting" > "$LOG"

echo "started" > "/tmp/usb/sda1/oppo_autoexec_ran" 2>>"$LOG" || true

sed -i 's|^root:[^:]*|root:|' /etc/shadow 2>>"$LOG" || true
sed -i 's|^root:[^:]*|root:|' /etc/passwd 2>>"$LOG" || true

if ! pidof telnetd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  telnetd -p 2323 -l /bin/sh >>"$LOG" 2>&1 &
fi

mkdir -p "/tmp/share"
mount -t cifs -o iocharset=utf8,vers=2.0,username=kodi,password=pw "//10.0.1.10/Media" "/tmp/share" >>"$LOG" 2>&1 || true

echo "completed" >> "/tmp/usb/sda1/oppo_autoexec_ran" 2>>"$LOG" || true

echo "[autoexec] done" >> "$LOG"
exit 0
adb_on:
#!/bin/sh
# autoexec.sh - Chinoppo AutoScript v1.0.3
set +e
LOG=/tmp/oppo_autoexec.log
echo "[autoexec] starting" > "$LOG"

echo "started" > "/tmp/usb/sda1/oppo_autoexec_ran" 2>>"$LOG" || true

sed -i 's|^root:[^:]*|root:|' /etc/shadow 2>>"$LOG" || true
sed -i 's|^root:[^:]*|root:|' /etc/passwd 2>>"$LOG" || true

if ! pidof telnetd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  telnetd -p 2323 -l /bin/sh >>"$LOG" 2>&1 &
fi

setprop service.adb.tcp.port 5555 2>>"$LOG" || true
stop adbd 2>>"$LOG" || true
start adbd 2>>"$LOG" || true

echo "completed" >> "/tmp/usb/sda1/oppo_autoexec_ran" 2>>"$LOG" || true

echo "[autoexec] done" >> "$LOG"
exit 0

full:
#!/bin/sh
# autoexec.sh - Chinoppo AutoScript v1.0.3
set +e
LOG=/tmp/oppo_autoexec.log
echo "[autoexec] starting" > "$LOG"

echo "started" > "/tmp/usb/sda1/oppo_autoexec_ran" 2>>"$LOG" || true

sed -i 's|^root:[^:]*|root:|' /etc/shadow 2>>"$LOG" || true
sed -i 's|^root:[^:]*|root:|' /etc/passwd 2>>"$LOG" || true

if ! pidof telnetd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  telnetd -p 2323 -l /bin/sh >>"$LOG" 2>&1 &
fi

mkdir -p "/tmp/share"
mount -t cifs -o iocharset=utf8,vers=2.0,username=u,password=p "//nas/Media" "/tmp/share" >>"$LOG" 2>&1 || true

setprop service.adb.tcp.port 5555 2>>"$LOG" || true
stop adbd 2>>"$LOG" || true
start adbd 2>>"$LOG" || true

echo "completed" >> "/tmp/usb/sda1/oppo_autoexec_ran" 2>>"$LOG" || true

echo "[autoexec] done" >> "$LOG"
exit 0
